events.title: Like Nastya
events.description: Like Nastya - the world's biggest kids' influencer with over 409 million followers - presents her first solo live concert, "Live Nastya Universe." This show is a family-friendly, high-energy live show created especially for children ages 2-10 and their parents. events.description: Escape the hustle and bustle of the city and experience the natural beauty of Miami like never before! Kayak along the scenic C-100 canal and explore the breathtaking Coral Reef Park. With our affordable rental fees, you can enjoy the serenity of the water at your leisure.
